author: @professorfidelcat
text:
this is a rare video of someone replicating a Charles Flynn device!! im glad your trying it and hope we can see if the patent holds any truth in it..i think you can also use 4 motorcycle magneto coils particularly from an old RX100 Yamaha or so (something from the 1980s) they have thin coils for the magneto spark and thicker coils for the lighting all coiled on laminated iron.. please check it out :
http://www.safexbikes.com/images/L.T.%20COIL/LT-Coil.jpg
